scripts.rebuild:vsix: npm run clean:vsix && npm run build:vsix
scripts.install:vsix: bash -lc 'VSIX=$(ls -t ./*.vsix 2>/dev/null | head -n1); if [[ -z "$VSIX" ]]; then echo "No .vsix file found. Run npm run build:vsix first."; exit 1; fi; code --install-extension "$VSIX" --force'
scripts.test:theme: echo 'Run the launch configuration: Theme Test (Extension Host)'
